tr:display-component.name: SINGLE QUESTION LIST
tr:display-component.tr:description: Displays a list showing all the responses to a fill-in-the-blank question or recorded values for a hidden field.

tr:parameter.name: Name of question or hidden field
tr:parameter.tr:description: The question or hidden field whose values you wish to display.

tr:parameter.name: Show only responses from records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the responses in records that match these conditions will be shown.

tr:display-component.name: MULTIPLE QUESTION LIST
tr:display-component.tr:description: Displays a table showing a list of responses to specified questions in a Form.

tr:parameter.name: Number of Columns
tr:parameter.tr:description: The number of Fields to display.

tr:parameter.name: Column Information
tr:parameter.tr:description: Information about columns in the table.

tr:parameter.name: Column $n$ Heading
tr:parameter.tr:description: The heading to display for column $n$.

tr:parameter.name: Column $n$ Field
tr:parameter.tr:description: The Field to display in column $n$.

tr:parameter.name: Show only fields from records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the fields in records that match these conditions will be shown.

tr:display-component.name: RESPONSE BAR GRAPH
tr:display-component.tr:description: Displays a bar graph showing both the number and percentage of each response to a multiple-choice question.

tr:parameter.name: Question
tr:parameter.tr:description: The multiple choice question whose number and percentage information you wish to show.

tr:parameter.name: Include only the records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the records that match these conditions will be included in the calculation of the number and percentage values.

tr:display-component.name: RESPONSE TOTALS
tr:display-component.tr:description: Displays a table showing the count of each response to a multiple-choice question.

tr:parameter.name: Table Layout
tr:parameter.tr:description: Determines the general layout of the RESPONSE TOTALS table. The "Tall" layout yields a table with "Choice" and "Count" columns. The "Wide" layout yields a table with "Choice" and "Count" rows.

tr:parameter.name: Question
tr:parameter.tr:description: The multiple choice question whose count values you wish to show.

tr:parameter.name: Include only the records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the records that match these conditions will be included in the calculation of the count values.

tr:display-component.name: RANKED MULTIQUESTION RESPONSE LIST
tr:display-component.tr:description: Computes the most common response to a multiple-choice question and displays a list of the contents of an associated field for users who have chosen that response. It also compares the response choice of one multiple-choice question with a second multiple-choice question.

tr:parameter.name: Rank
tr:parameter.tr:description: Indicates the ranking of the popular choice, e.g. first most popular, second most popular, etc.

tr:parameter.name: Main Question
tr:parameter.tr:description: The multiple choice question for which you wish to display popular choice information.

tr:parameter.name: Second Question
tr:parameter.tr:description: The multiple choice question to correlate with the main question.

tr:parameter.name: Column One Contents
tr:parameter.tr:description: The field whose values will be shown in the first column of the table.

tr:parameter.name: Display only choices from records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the choices in records that match these conditions will be shown.

tr:display-component.name: RANKED RESPONSE NAME
tr:display-component.tr:description: Displays the text of the most popular response choice to a specified multiple-choice question.

tr:parameter.name: Rank
tr:parameter.tr:description: Indicates the ranking of the popular choice, e.g. first most popular, second most popular, etc.

tr:parameter.name: Question
tr:parameter.tr:description: The multiple choice question for which you wish to display popular choice information.

tr:parameter.name: Display only text from records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the choice text in records that match these conditions will be shown.

tr:display-component.name: QUESTION CORRELATION TABLE
tr:display-component.tr:description: Displays a table showing the choices made by all respondents to a multiple choice question. The left-most column contains the names of the respondents (or any fill-in-the-blank or text field you choose to display). The other columns indicate which choices were selected. Optionally, a second multiple choice question can be designated to indicate the favored choice for each respondent.

tr:parameter.name: Question with all choices
tr:parameter.tr:description: Drag-and-drop or double-click the multiple choice question whose responses you want to display in the table.

tr:parameter.name: Field to display in left column
tr:parameter.tr:description: Drag-and-drop or double-click a fill-in-the-blank or hidden field that you want to have appear as the "record identifier" in the table. (Often this will be the name of the respondent.)

tr:parameter.name: Question with preferred choice
tr:parameter.tr:description: Drag-and-drop or double click a second multiple choice question that indicates the respondents' preferred choice, if several choices are allowed in the first question above. (Example: The first question might ask respondents for all available dates for an event; the second question would ask for the preferred date.)

tr:parameter.name: Display only the records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the records that match these conditions will be displayed.

tr:display-component.name: PAYPAL SINGLE ITEM PURCHASE BUTTON
tr:display-component.tr:description: Creates a button that allows you to sell a single item, request payment for services or receive a donation. Note: To use this function in your projects you must arrange for online payment support with Tawala Systems, Inc. Visit our website for further details.

tr:parameter.name: Type of button
tr:parameter.tr:description: Pick the transaction type that is appropriate for your case.

tr:parameter.name: Item/service description.
tr:parameter.tr:description: Field or variable that contains the description of the service. This description will be shown to the user during the payment process.

tr:parameter.name: Transaction amount.
tr:parameter.tr:description: Field or variable that contains the transaction amount.

tr:parameter.name: Return to this form on success.
tr:parameter.tr:description: After paying for this transaction the user will be redirected to this form.

tr:parameter.name: Return to this form on failure to pay.
tr:parameter.tr:description: If the transaction is cancelled or cannot be completed for some reason the user will be redirected to this form.

tr:parameter.name: Store the transaction status in this field.
tr:parameter.tr:description: Upon successful transaction this field will be automatically updated with the status.

tr:parameter.name: Store the transaction amount in this field.
tr:parameter.tr:description: Upon successful transaction this field will be automatically updated with the amount paid.

tr:parameter.name: Select how to style PayPal screens
tr:parameter.tr:description: Choose how to style PayPal screens. If you have already done that using PayPal's administration tools select the first one.

tr:display-component.name: CATEGORIZER
tr:display-component.tr:description: Provides an interactive (drag and drop) method for grouping stored records into categories.

tr:parameter.name: Category Names
tr:parameter.tr:description: The field whose values will be shown as the category names in the Target table.

tr:parameter.name: Category IDs
tr:parameter.tr:description: The field whose values will be used as the category IDs. This is the identifier that will be stored in the "Category Storage Field" of a record when a category is assigned to that record.

tr:parameter.name: Category Storage Field
tr:parameter.tr:description: This field in the Source list record will be set to the "Category ID" when that record is assigned a category.

tr:parameter.name: Show this form on completion
tr:parameter.tr:description: When the user finishes the categorization and selects "Save Changes" this form will be shown.

tr:parameter.name: Number of Fields to display
tr:parameter.tr:description: The number of fields (columns) to display in the Source list.

tr:parameter.name: Source Field Information
tr:parameter.tr:description: Settings for the displayed fields in the Source table.

tr:parameter.name: Column $n$ Heading
tr:parameter.tr:description: The heading to display for column $n$.

tr:parameter.name: Column $n$ Field
tr:parameter.tr:description: The Field to display in column $n$.

tr:parameter.name: Show only fields from records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the fields in records that match these conditions will be shown in the Source list.

tr:parameter.name: Display text
tr:parameter.tr:description: Field containing the text that will be displayed as the choices for this multiple choice question.

tr:parameter.name: Value
tr:parameter.tr:description: Field containing a value that will be associated with the selection of a choice. For example, this could be a unique ID that you use for matching choices with other data, or it could be value (such as a price) associated with each item.

tr:parameter.name: Sort by
tr:parameter.tr:description: The choices will be sorted by this field in ascending order.

tr:parameter.name: Only display choices meeting the specified conditions
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the records that match these conditions will be offered as choices.

tr:display-component.name: DISPLAY MULTIPLE-CHOICE QUESTION RESPONSES
tr:display-component.tr:description: Displays the text of the response choice in a multiple-choice question.

tr:parameter.name: Multiple Choice Field
tr:parameter.tr:description: The label of the selected multiple-choice question.

tr:parameter.name: Display
tr:parameter.tr:description: Select how the responses will be displayed.

tr:choice.description: all choices, using the question layout

tr:display-component.name: LINK TO PROJECT DETAILS IN MY TAWALA
tr:display-component.tr:description: Creates a link to navigate to the project details of the current project.

tr:parameter.name: Link text
tr:parameter.tr:description: Text of the link.

tr:parameter.name: Open in
tr:parameter.tr:description: Determines how the page will be open.

tr:function.name: SUM
tr:function.tr:description: Calculates the sum of the values in a fill-in-the-blank question or hidden field.

tr:parameter.name: Name of question or hidden field
tr:parameter.tr:description: The blank or hidden field whose values you wish to sum.

tr:parameter.name: Include only the records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the records that match these conditions will be included in the calculation of the sum.

tr:function.name: FORM RECORD COUNT
tr:function.tr:description: Returns the number of responses received by a specified Form.

tr:parameter.name: Form
tr:parameter.tr:description: The form whose records you wish to count.

tr:parameter.name: Count only the records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the records that match these conditions will be included in the calculation of the count.

tr:function.name: RANKED RESPONSE COUNTS
tr:function.tr:description: Returns the number of responses that selected the most popular choice for a given multiple choice question.

tr:parameter.name: Rank
tr:parameter.tr:description: Indicates the ranking of the popular choice, e.g. first most popular, second most popular, etc.

tr:parameter.name: Question
tr:parameter.tr:description: The multiple choice question for which you wish to display popular choice information.

tr:parameter.name: Include only the records
tr:parameter.tr:description: Only the records that match these conditions will be included in the calculation of the count.
